title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.317 - Babe Adams Highway designated
text:
227.317.  Babe Adams Highway designated. — The portion of U.S. Highway 136 in Harrison County, from the eastern city limits of Bethany to the Harrison-Mercer County line, shall be designated the "Babe Adams Highway".
(L. 2002 H.B. 1141, et al.)
